8274)*u^44 + (501*z + 10128)*u^43 + (492*z + 9153)*u^42 + (3107*z + 10529)*u^41 + (2946*z + 11507)*u^40 + (2518*z + 9388)*u^39 + (4208*z + 9166)*u^38 + (2678*z + 8006)*u^37 + (340*z + 3018)*u^36 + (846*z + 325)*u^35 + (1151*z + 521)*u^34 + (1309*z + 630)*u^33 + (1340*z + 679)*u^32 + (1231*z + 661)*u^31 + (1055*z + 570)*u^30 + (846*z + 485)*u^29 + (595*z + 361)*u^28 + (374*z + 234)*u^27 + (206*z + 140)*u^26 + (66*z + 66)*u^25)*v^2 + (-z*u^59 + (-2*z - 1)*u^58 + (-3*z - 1)*u^57 + (-5*z - 2)*u^56 + (-7*z - 3)*u^55 + (-9*z - 4)*u^54 + (-12*z - 5)*u^53 + (-15*z - 7)*u^52 + (-18*z - 8)*u^51 + (-22*z - 10)*u^50 + (-26*z - 12)*u^49 + (-30*z + 22)*u^48 + (-71*z + 55)*u^47 + (-111*z - 38)*u^46 + (-26*z - 5)*u^45 + (-67*z + 28)*u^44 + (-109*z - 66)*u^43 + (-24*z - 33)*u^42 + (-67*z - 1)*u^41 + (-109*z - 95)*u^40 + (-26*z - 63)*u^39 + (-69*z - 31)*u^38 + (-113*z - 126)*u^37 + (-30*z - 94)*u^36 + (-26*z - 14)*u^35 + (-22*z - 12)*u^34 + (-18*z - 10)*u^33 + (-15*z - 8)*u^32 + (-12*z - 7)*u^31 + (-9*z - 5)*u^30 + (-7*z - 4)*u^29 + (-5*z - 3)*u^28 + (-3*z - 2)*u^27 + (-2*z - 1)*u^26 + (-z - 1)*u^25)*v + u^48 + (-z - 1)*u^47 + z*u^46 + u^45 + (-z - 1)*u^44 + z*u^43 + u^42 + (-z - 1)*u^41 + z*u^40 + u^39 + (-z - 1)*u^38 + z*u^37 + u^36;
q := u+1;
t := (v*u)/(u+1);
E := [(1+q)*t+(2-q),0,q*t^2+(1-q)*t,0,0];
P := [R!0,0];
Q := [-t,t^2];
